so the xiaomi 14 pro is here and it s finally in our studio all the way from china of course we had to import the first snapdragon ag gen 3 phone and we had to see what improvements has xiaomi made to the camera setup this time around there are a few interesting changes that i m going to talk about in this video as well and give you my first impressions along with a performance review and camera test as well so stay tuned till the end of the video to see if you should wait for the xiaomi 14 pro when it launches in india if you re here for the first time i m m sure you re watching track and tech english your destination for d incisive gadget reviews so talking about the phone and the design of the phone itself it s a very premium looking phone i m not a fan of this jade green color per say because it seems to be done to death right now but it still looks very very good what i about the build itself is the fact that xiaomi has used a ceramic glass this time around they call it xiaomi ceramic glass and they claim that it is tougher than actual regular glass the glass on the front and the back is both ceramic glass and it s 10x stronger than regular glass and it s also 1

2x the pictures that we got with it were very very impressive they are detailed they re sharp even the low light performance is very good as well but the teley macro implementation is clearly superb on the xiaomi 14 pro you do not get the lens distortion that you get with ultra white macro cameras the teley macro has been done very very well because you can go as close as 10 cm of a subject and the pictures that we got were impressive i think they re definitely the industry best teley macro or mac macro implementation on a phone now with the 32mp selfie camera the pictures that we took the skin tones were not as good as the primary camera but they re serviceable and the selfie cameras hdr performance could have been slightly better too the low light performance especially is not that great but with selfie portrait mode the edge cutout and the boka drop off has been well done but what i m happy about is that the selfie camera can shoot 4k 60 fps videos now and the video quality is very good the stabilization is pretty good and the videos that we got looked sharp in daylight and the low performance was decent too in fact you can shoot shoot 4k 60 fps videos using the primary the ultra wide and the telephoto so all the cameras on the xiaomi 14 pro can shoot 4k 60 fps videos and these 4k 60 fps videos are well done well implemented of course not apple iphone level but in daylight you can get really good footage out of it in fact we were very surprised by the stabilization capabilities of the primary camera itself and if you want you can also shoot 4k 60 fps videos in dollby vision format as well this is going to be 10 bit videos that to this is going to be a feature that is going to be present on many android flagships in the future as well overall we re very happy with the camera performance of the xiaomi 14 pro and we can t wait for the global unit or the indian unit to come so we can compare it with a few other phones but ideally we would love to compare it to of course the iphone 15 pro max and whatever ag gen 3 phones launch in the future so the i 12 pro the oneplus 12 all of those so to watch those videos what you have to do is subscribe to track and tech english all right the xiaomi 14 pro with the snapdragon agent 3 is fantastic we really really it we loved using it as well the performance of course it shouldn t have gotten so hot but it doesn t throttle so that is something that we can take as a compromise also the global rom could have better performance with the xiaomi 14 pro we ll have to wait and watch overall good impressive flagship phone definitely a great upgrade over the xiaomi 13 pro but here s the kicker in china the price is 491 which is about 58,000 rupees and of course it won t come at the 58,000 rupe price but in china it s great value man and in india after discounts even if you get it for 70,000 this is going to be a very very good flagship phone to recommend only thing we ll have to wait and watch to see how hyper os implementation has been done in global variants or if at all that implementation happens so what do you you guys think of the xiaomi 14 pro let me know in the comments below and i ll see you guys in the next one until then keep tracking and stay safe

6 million that we ve managed with the asus r phone 7 ultimate and the realme gt5 so definitely quite an improvement in ano scores when compared to the snapdragon ag gen 2 phones that we tested in the past now in gig bench we got a single core score of about 2174 points and a multi core score of over 7,000 points in comparison with the s23 ultra it s about a 5 to 10 increase in single core points and multi core score has jumped 30 so if you have heavy workloads and if you need a multi threaded performance snapdragon agent 3 inside the xiaomi 14 pro will be fantastic but i m sure that you guys want to know if the phone throttles or not so we ran the cpu throttle test which you generally do 40 threats for 30 minutes in the performance mode and after that test we got a cpu stability score of 82 2 which is fantastic anything above 80 is really really good having said that if you do use the xiaomi 14 pro in performance mode it does get very hot with the cpu throttle test after 30 minutes the temperature touched almost 50 so that s one thing that you have to keep in mind we also did run 3d mark wildlife stress test we gently do and we got a stability of about 71 this is definitely higher than the 65 that we achieved with the samsung galaxy s23 ultra but again i have to mention this the xiaomi 14 pro did reach 50 in temperature and lost about 177 battery as well again we ran this in performance mode too now one of the things about the agent 3 is that hardware enabled rate racing has also been improved by quite a bit however rt enabled games on android are still not available so we haven t been able to test any games per se but there is a benchmark test the 3d mark solar bay test which you did run on this so in that test the 14 pro with the agent3 scored above 8,000 points and about 31 fps in comparison the s23 ultra scored about 5,600 points and 21 2 one fps so definitely you can see an improvement in fps and in performance of rt in general on the agent 3 compared to the agent 2 now generally we do also run a gaming test on most of our high end flagship phones where we capture the fps data and figure out what average fps we get and we play gin impact for about 30 minutes unfortunately we couldn t run our test that we generally do because it required a bootloader unlock and the xiaomi 14 pro currently if you need a bootloader unlock you have to make a request on the community forum and if you do end up unlocking the bootloader then you can kiss goodbye to updates because xiaomi has said that anybody who unlocks the bootloader will not get hyper os updates so we didn t want to go through all of that trouble in an imported unit but we did end up playing j impact regardless and we didn t notice too many frame drops when we were playing the game either having said that if you want a proper gaming test on the xiaomi 14 pro wait for the indian unit or the global unit when it comes to us now with respect to graphics settings what we notice is that cood runs at 120 fps medium and ultra and you can play bgmi at 60 fps as well and the ultra hdr option is available too but i have a feeling that agent3 will be able to run these games at higher graphics and better frame rates as well currently it s a little too early for all of these games to be optimized for the agent3 and the xiaomi 14 pro as a result so we ll have to wait and watch so performance wise on the xiaomi 14 pro if you do end up using the performance mode it will get really hot but it doesn t throttle if you re okay with throttling then you can bump it down to balance mode and it doesn t heat up too much regardless this could also be a chinese variant specific issue and when the global rom comes out the tuning could be slightly different now before i talk about the camera there s also hyper os which is the replacement to miui on the xiaomi 14 pro running for the very first time hyper os 1
